response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, architectural design using UML, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this role's client-facing and compliance-focused responsibilities.
strengths: Proven track record in open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Extensive full-stack experience across languages, systems, and DevOps tooling
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German proficiency is only basic, falling far short of required C1 level
No explicit evidence of UML modeling, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Work history is primarily product-focused, lacking consulting or enterprise IT governance context
